executionModelDetail: Parent-expanded by bubbles.workflow because the workflow runtime lacked the runSubagent tool — the analyst/design/plan/implement/test/regression/simplify/gaps/harden/stabilize/security/validate/audit/chaos/docs roles were executed directly in-session (the documented smackerel precedent, e.g. spec 097 / spec 103). SCOPE-01 (in-repo instrumentation contract) is complete + offline-proven. SCOPE-02 (live shared-stack confirmation) is a NON-GATING operational handoff routed to bubbles.devops; the in-repo contract needs zero further smackerel code, so spec-101 certifies on SCOPE-01 + the contract.
reconciliation: Reconciliation, not greenfield. Current-truth audit found /metrics (internal/api/router.go), the OTLP/gRPC exporter (internal/assistant/tracing), and the otel-go SDK already shipped. Genuine gaps closed: knb 3-var contract naming (replacing declared-not-consumed OTEL_EXPORTER_ENDPOINT), a fail-loud internal/observability reader, OTEL_ENABLED-gated boot validation, and com.bubbles.* discovery labels. Existing exporter + /metrics REUSED, not forked (knb FINDING-014-03-1). Operator decision option (a); knb adapter side needs zero rework.

scopeProgress.name: In-repo instrumentation contract (naming + fail-loud reader + labels)
Operational live-verification handoff to bubbles.devops (non-gating)
scopeProgress.dispositionNote: SCN-101-A04 live shared-stack confirmation is a NON-GATING operational handoff routed to bubbles.devops; the in-repo contract (SCOPE-01) is complete and needs zero further smackerel code. Unblock action: operator sets smackerel sharedServices.observability: shared in the knb adapter params + runs apply-shared-obs on the deploy host.

followUps.task: Live shared-stack confirmation: a /metrics 200 scraped by the shared Prometheus (product=smackerel) + OTLP spans in the shared Tempo
followUps.unblock: operator sets smackerel sharedServices.observability: shared in the knb adapter params + runs apply-shared-obs on the deploy host
